theme_summary: Filthy cellar scavengers and grease-soaked wretches haunting an old rendering pit beneath a ruined quarter.
background_prompt_shared: Grounded medieval fantasy cellar interior, full-body enemy scene background, cracked brick walls stained by old soot rather than pitch black, low timber beams darkened by grease, hanging iron hooks, old tallow vats, small puddles of yellowed runoff across uneven flagstones, stub candles in iron saucers, soft amber candlelight with enough fill light to read the room clearly, muted brown, ochre, and ash-grey palette, no crowd, no heroic framing, dingy and poor but readable.
family_flavor_text: Even the city cast this place beneath itself. What still feeds here has learned to thrive on runoff, smoke, and the patience of hunger.

theme_summary: Rope-haunted yard scavengers, cemetery vermin, and weak refuse-born things lingering around a ruined parish workyard among snapped bell lines, wet ash, and broken bronze.
background_prompt_shared: Grounded medieval fantasy ruined parish workyard, full-body enemy scene background, same family zone for every monster, snapped bell ropes hanging from warped timber frames, cracked gravestones stacked near old stone walls, broken bronze bell fragments in wet mud, dead weeds, shallow puddles, pale overcast daylight, muted stone-grey, weathered brown, and dull bronze palette with only a very slight cool blue-green marsh tint in the air and puddle reflections, no crowd, no heroic framing, worn and austere but open enough that the monster reads clearly; vary the exact composition per monster within this same yard by placing them near different landmarks such as the bell frame, grave markers, puddled bronze, rope coils, parish wall, or gate path.
family_flavor_text: Keeps the memory of labor after the faith is gone. Rope, mud, and old bronze remain enough for lesser things to make a home of it.

theme_summary: Kiln-yard drudges, ash-fed scavenger beasts, and weak kiln-born refuse things turned territorial among dead furnaces and lime-choked rubble.
background_prompt_shared: Grounded medieval fantasy dead kiln yard, full-body enemy scene background, same family zone for every monster, broken brick furnace mouths, heaps of pale ash and soot, scorched tools, cracked lime barrels, shattered wheelbarrows, dusty ground with ash drifts, dry daylight through a light smoke haze, muted brick-red, chalk-white, and soot-grey palette, no crowd, no heroic framing, worn industrial ruin with clear readable separation around the monster; vary the exact composition per monster within this same yard by placing them near different landmarks such as furnace mouths, lime barrels, ash drifts, broken carts, tool racks, or open yard paths.
family_flavor_text: Keeps the shape of labor after purpose has burned away. Smoke, dust, and old discipline have left these things harder than hunger alone could make them.
